question: The chart shows global smartphone market share in 2024. Which statement is correct according to the percentages shown?

options.A: Huawei has a higher market share than Others.
options.B: Others has the largest market share among the categories shown.
options.C: Apple has a higher market share than Samsung.
options.D: Apple and Huawei have the same market share.

explanation: From the labels, Xiaomi has the highest share (65%). The bars' heights are not proportional to the percentages (they use a separate 'height' value), which can mislead viewers into thinking Others is largest when relying on visual comparison.
